title: Correct birth year for Hollis, Marion in 1900 census row
description: The birth year transcribed as 1878 should read 1876 per the original enumeration image.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Duplicate entry for Thomas Bennett, Annapolis 1880
description: Two rows exist for the same individual; the second should be merged into the first.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Missing source citation on Owings marriage record
description: Record lacks a citation to the parish register page it was drawn from.
author: sam-whitcomb

title: Standardize date format on West Annapolis burial rows
description: Mixed MM/DD/YYYY and YYYY-MM-DD formats should be normalized to ISO.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Headstone transcription typo: Whitcomb plot, St. Anne's
description: Given name reads 'Josiah' but the stone clearly reads 'Josias'.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Add photo reference for Doyle family markers
description: Rows for the Doyle plot should link to the headstone photograph filenames.
author: sam-whitcomb

title: Correct death date on Briggs, Eleanor entry
description: Death year should be 1911 rather than 1912 per the burial register.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Merge duplicate cemetery sections for Cedar Bluff
description: Section listed twice under slightly different spellings.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Verify plot numbering against sexton's map
description: Plot numbers in the north row do not match the sexton's diagram.
author: sam-whitcomb

title: Fix transposed columns in 1910 census import
description: Occupation and birthplace columns appear swapped for one district.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Illegible surname flagged for review: District 3
description: Enumerator handwriting unclear; needs a second reader.
author: sam-whitcomb

title: Correct household grouping for the Pindell family
description: Boarders were mistakenly listed as household members.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Add missing enumeration district numbers
description: Several transcribed pages omit the ED number in the header.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Normalize state abbreviation to MD in birthplace field
description: Mixed 'Md.', 'Maryland', and 'MD' values should be standardized.
author: sam-whitcomb

title: Correct baptism date for Owings infant, 1854
description: Day transcribed as 3rd should read 13th per the register margin.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Duplicate marriage entry for Bennett-Doyle union
description: Same marriage recorded under both spouses' surnames.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Add officiant name to 1867 marriage rows
description: The minister's name from the register is missing on several entries.
author: sam-whitcomb

title: Merge surname variants: Hollis / Holliss
description: Both spellings refer to the same family line and should be cross-linked.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Correct alphabetical sort on 'Mc' surnames
description: Entries beginning 'Mc' are sorting after 'Mz'; sort key needs fixing.
author: sam-whitcomb

title: Add cross-reference for maiden and married names
description: Women's married-name entries should link back to maiden-name records.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Correct parcel acreage on Munroe land grant
description: Acreage transcribed as 140 should read 40 per the patent text.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Fix mislabeled grantor on 1721 patent
description: Grantor and grantee fields appear reversed for this parcel.
author: sam-whitcomb

title: Add source page for Severn tract references
description: Parcel rows need a citation to the survey book page.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Fix broken link in contributor citation guide
description: The link to the county archives style page returns a 404.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Clarify date-format convention in handbook
description: Handbook should state that all dates use ISO format going forward.
author: sam-whitcomb

title: Add section on merging duplicate records
description: Contributors need documented steps for flagging and merging duplicates.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Correct typo in surname-index instructions
description: 'Alphabatize' should read 'alphabetize' in the contributor guide.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Import script drops leading zeros in record IDs
description: Record IDs like 007 become 7 after import; padding must be preserved.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Handle blank birthplace cells in batch import
description: Empty cells import as the literal string 'NULL' instead of staying blank.
author: sam-whitcomb

title: Add checksum log to record-batch importer
description: Each import should record a row count so contributors can verify totals.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Trim trailing whitespace on imported surnames
description: Some imported surnames carry trailing spaces that break the index sort.
author: juan-hernandez

title: Document required columns for import CSV
description: Contributors need a clear list of mandatory columns before importing.
